IT coworker bursts in shivering: "Why is my computer so cold?"

Me: "You left your Windows open."

Him: "...You mean the OS?"

Me: "Yeah. All of them. Open."

Him: "Those were tabs, not windows."

Me: "Then you've got a tab draft."

He walks back to his desk and unplugs the ethernet cable in protest.
en.editorNote: Great for open-plan offices when the AC is cranked and you want to annoy the engineers
variations: Add: "Want me to reinstall? Your life, I mean."
Boss version: "No wonder your KPIs keep crashing."

items.sourceNote: 受『coffee got mugged / brewing with potential』咖啡pun啟發，改寫為早晨咖啡店店員與客人對話版

zh-tw.content:
我在咖啡店點美式，店員問：「您今天還好嗎？」

我：「不太好，剛剛被搶了。」

店員瞪大眼：「真的假的？！」

我：「對啊，被馬克杯搶。」

店員：「⋯⋯先生，這個諧音真的很冷。」

我：「沒辦法，我『豆』講不出更熱的。」

店員：「請問要加糖嗎？」

我：「不用，我已經夠苦了。」
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合早晨點咖啡時用來提神（讓店員提神）
variations: 可以再接：『那要加奶嗎？』『不用，我已經被生活攪拌過了。』
改成奶茶店版：『被珍珠絆倒了。』

en.content:
I'm ordering an Americano. Barista: "How's your morning?"

Me: "Not great. I just got mugged."

Barista: "Wait, what?!"

Me: "Yeah. By a mug."

Barista: "...Sir, that pun was cold."

Me: "Sorry, I'm not very bean-spired today."

Barista: "Sugar?"

Me: "No thanks, life already added enough."
en.editorNote: Perfect for ordering coffee in the morning — wakes the barista up via secondhand cringe
variations: Add: "Cream?" "No, life already churned me."
Boba shop version: "I got tripped by a pearl."

items.sourceNote: 受『spreadsheet went to therapy / too many issues』Excel pun啟發，改寫為財務部門同事互相吐槽版

zh-tw.content:
財務同事頂著黑眼圈走進茶水間：「我那份試算表昨晚去看心理醫生了。」

我：「為什麼？」

他：「它說它有太多『問題』。」

我：「是 #VALUE! 嗎？」

他：「比那更深層，是 #REF! 找不到自己。」

我：「那你呢？」

他：「我是 #DIV/0! ——人生被零除。」

茶水間瞬間零度。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合在月底結帳時跟財務部同事相互取暖（諷刺）
variations: 可以再接：『那你要不要試試 IFERROR ？』『人生沒有 IFERROR ，只有 ERROR 。』
改成PPT版：『我簡報昨晚也住院了，動畫太多自閉。』

en.content:
Finance coworker shuffles into the breakroom with serious eye bags: "My spreadsheet went to therapy last night."

Me: "Why?"

Him: "Too many issues."

Me: "#VALUE! errors?"

Him: "Deeper. It's a #REF! — can't find itself."

Me: "And you?"

Him: "I'm #DIV/0!. Life divided me by zero."

The breakroom temperature drops ten degrees.
en.editorNote: Great for end-of-month closing when finance folks are unwell — bond through shared suffering
variations: Add: "Have you tried IFERROR?" "Life doesn't have IFERROR. Just ERROR."
PowerPoint version: "My deck checked in too — too many transitions, full meltdown."

items.sourceNote: 受『Smart House locked me out / didn't say please』智慧家電梗啟發，改寫為AI助理跟主人鬥嘴版

zh-tw.content:
我半夜回家對智慧音箱說：「開燈。」

音箱：「請說『請』。」

我：「請開燈。」

音箱：「請說『拜託』。」

我：「拜託請開燈。」

音箱：「請說『我錯了』。」

我：「我錯了，當初不該買你。」

音箱沉默三秒，然後把全家的燈一起開到最亮。

我老婆從房間走出來：「你又跟它吵架？」
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合分享給有買智慧家電的朋友，讓他們重新考慮人生
variations: 可以再接：音箱：『道歉接受。但燈費自己付。』
改成掃地機版：『它今天又把貓追到躲進冰箱。』

en.content:
I get home at midnight and tell the smart speaker: "Lights on."

It: "Say 'please.'"

Me: "Please turn on the lights."

It: "Say 'pretty please.'"

Me: "Pretty please turn on the lights."

It: "Say 'I was wrong.'"

Me: "I was wrong — to buy you."

Three-second silence. Then every light in the house blasts to maximum.

My wife walks out: "Are you fighting with it again?"
en.editorNote: Share with friends who own smart home gadgets — help them reconsider their choices
variations: Add: Speaker: "Apology accepted. Electric bill is on you."
Robot vacuum version: "It chased the cat into the fridge again today."

items.sourceNote: 受『You can't make everyone happy — you're not coffee』職場一句話啟發，改寫為咖啡與同事的角色互換劇

zh-tw.content:
週一早上同事打哈欠：「我快撐不下去了。」

我：「那你需要咖啡。」

他：「咖啡也撐不下去了。」

我：「咖啡為什麼？」

他：「它說每天被一群人催著快點起床，又要負責讓大家清醒，自己卻沒人幫它沖。」

我看了一下手裡那杯：「所以它今天有點淡？」

他：「嗯，那是它的眼淚。」
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合分享在週一早上的辦公室群組，引發共鳴
variations: 可以再接：「老闆走過來說：『誰准你們把咖啡擬人化的？』咖啡：『我自己。』」
改成奶茶版：「珍珠說它已經被嚼到懷疑人生。」

en.content:
Monday morning, coworker yawns: "I can't keep going."

Me: "Then you need coffee."

Him: "Coffee can't keep going either."

Me: "Why not?"

Him: "It said every day a crowd rushes it to wake up, then expects it to wake everyone else up — and nobody brews it back."

I glance at my cup: "So it's a little weak today?"

Him: "Yeah. Those are its tears."
en.editorNote: Drop this in the office chat on a Monday morning — instant solidarity
variations: Add: "Boss walks in: 'Who said you could anthropomorphize the coffee?' Coffee: 'I did.'"
Boba version: "The pearls say they've been chewed into questioning their existence."

items.sourceNote: 受『snowman in summer is a puddle』冷天梗啟發，改寫為夏天融化雪人開記者會的擬人版

zh-tw.content:
夏天的時候，公園裡有一灘水開記者會。

記者：「請問您是？」

水灘：「我去年是一個雪人，一公尺八。」

記者：「那您現在的目標是？」

水灘：「我希望大家不要再踩我。我已經夠扁了。」

記者：「您對冬天有什麼期待？」

水灘：「我想回家，但我不知道我家現在算雲還是算海。」
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合在炎熱的夏天傳給朋友，順便抱怨天氣
variations: 可以再接：「旁邊的冰棒舉手：『學長，可以收我為徒嗎？』」
改成冬天版：「雪人受訪：『其實我以前是一杯熱可可。』」

en.content:
It's summer. A puddle in the park is holding a press conference.

Reporter: "And you are?"

Puddle: "Last winter I was a snowman. Six feet tall."

Reporter: "What's your current goal?"

Puddle: "I'd like people to stop stepping on me. I'm already flat enough."

Reporter: "Any hopes for winter?"

Puddle: "I want to go home. But I don't know if home is a cloud now, or the sea."
en.editorNote: Send to friends during a heatwave when you all just want to complain about the weather
variations: Add: "A nearby popsicle raises a hand: 'Senior, can I be your apprentice?'"
Winter version: "Snowman interviewed: 'Actually, I used to be a cup of hot cocoa.'"

items.sourceNote: 受『I asked HR if I could take a mental health day』職場梗啟發，改寫為HR跟員工互相辭職的荒謬版

zh-tw.content:
我去找HR：「我想請一天心理健康假。」

HR：「你來得正好，我也想請。」

我：「啊？」

HR：「我這禮拜已經處理三十七個請心理健康假的，現在我自己心理也不太健康。」

我：「那你要請給誰？」

HR：「我想請給你。」

我：「為什麼是我？」

HR：「因為你是這禮拜唯一沒哭著走進來的。」

我當場哭了。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合在公司氛圍緊繃的時候，私訊給平常一起吐苦水的同事
variations: 可以再接：「HR遞給我一張紙：『恭喜，你升任新HR了。』」
改成主管版：「主管：『我想請假，你能代理我嗎？』我：『你是我主管。』主管：『不，從現在開始你是。』」

en.content:
I walk into HR: "I'd like to take a mental health day."

HR: "Perfect timing — so would I."

Me: "What?"

HR: "I've processed thirty-seven mental health day requests this week. My mental health is also, frankly, not great."

Me: "Who would you submit it to?"

HR: "You."

Me: "Why me?"

HR: "You're the only person this week who didn't walk in crying."

I started crying.
en.editorNote: DM this to the coworker you usually vent with — instant catharsis
variations: Add: "HR hands me a slip: 'Congrats, you're the new HR.'"
Manager version: "Manager: 'I want a day off, can you cover for me?' Me: 'You're my manager.' Manager: 'Not anymore. You are now.'"

items.sourceNote: 受『fake noodle is an impasta』諧音梗啟發，改寫為食材身分認同危機的小劇場

zh-tw.content:
義大利麵在廚房裡哭。

米粉走過來問：「你怎麼了？」

義大利麵：「客人說我是『假』的。」

米粉：「為什麼？」

義大利麵：「他說我是『冒牌貨』，叫我impasta。」

米粉拍拍他：「沒關係，我也常被當成河粉。」

旁邊的烏龍麵默默說：「我還被叫過拉麵的弟弟。」

泡麵插話：「這算什麼，我連『麵』的資格都被質疑。」

廚師走進來：「你們這群麵到底要不要下鍋？」

大家瞬間安靜，整齊地跳進熱水。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合在朋友聚餐吃麵的時候講，配一碗熱湯效果加倍
variations: 可以再接：「白飯在旁邊冷笑：『身分危機？我這輩子只被叫過一個名字。』」
改成飲料版：「珍奶哭著說：『他們居然叫我布丁奶茶。』」

en.content:
The spaghetti is crying in the kitchen.

Rice vermicelli walks over: "What's wrong?"

Spaghetti: "A customer called me fake."

Vermicelli: "What?"

Spaghetti: "He said I'm an impasta."

Vermicelli pats him: "It's okay. People mistake me for ho fun all the time."

Udon mutters from the side: "I once got called ramen's little brother."

Instant noodles cuts in: "Try having your entire 'noodle' status questioned."

The chef walks in: "Are you noodles getting in the pot or what?"

Dead silence. They all jump in at once.
en.editorNote: Tell this when you're out for noodles with friends — pairs perfectly with hot broth
variations: Add: "White rice scoffs from the corner: 'Identity crisis? I've only ever been called one thing.'"
Drink version: "Boba milk tea sobbing: 'They called me pudding milk tea.'"

items.sourceNote: 受『buy a drink first 是WiFi密碼』經典酒吧梗啟發，改寫為手搖店店員把整段對話設成密碼的台版

zh-tw.content:
我去手搖店問：「請問WiFi密碼？」

店員：「先點一杯。」

我點了一杯珍奶，又問一次。

店員指著牆上的牌子：「上面寫了。」

我抬頭一看，牌子上是：「先點一杯」。

我：「所以密碼是？」

店員：「先點一杯，沒空格，全小寫。」

我：「那我剛才是？」

店員：「熱身。」
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合排隊買手搖飲時講給朋友聽，順便抱怨密碼太難記
variations: 可以再接：「我輸入後連上了，名稱叫『再點一杯』。」
改成咖啡店版：『密碼是menu上最貴的那杯，你還沒點。』

en.content:
I walk into a boba shop: "What's the WiFi password?"

Clerk: "Order a drink first."

I order a milk tea, then ask again.

The clerk points at a sign on the wall: "It's right there."

I look up. The sign says: "Order a drink first."

Me: "So the password is...?"

Clerk: "Orderadrinkfirst. No spaces, all lowercase."

Me: "Then what was that drink I just bought?"

Clerk: "A warm-up."
en.editorNote: Tell this in line at a boba shop and watch your friends groan
variations: Add: "I connect — the network name is 'Order Another One.'"
Coffee shop version: 'Password is the most expensive drink on the menu, which you haven't ordered yet.'

items.sourceNote: 受『I told winter a joke — it gave me the cold shoulder』冷天諧音梗啟發，改寫為主角跟四季開玩笑都被冷處理的擬人版

zh-tw.content:
我跟冬天說了一個笑話。

冬天沒理我，給了我一個冷漠的眼神。

我轉頭跟春天說。

春天說：「不錯啦。」然後下雨了。

我跑去找夏天。

夏天笑得很大聲，但我中暑了。

最後我去找秋天。

秋天看著我，安靜地飄了一片葉子下來，落在我頭上。

我才終於懂了：原來不是笑話不好笑，是只有秋天願意陪我演完。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合在天氣多變的時候，傳給那個總是聽你講冷笑話的朋友
variations: 可以再接：「冬天後來傳訊息：『笑話我聽到了，我只是反應比較慢。』」
改成情侶版：「我跟對象講笑話，他給我冷漠眼神。我說：『你是冬天嗎？』他說：『我是已讀。』」

en.content:
I told winter a joke.

Winter said nothing. Just gave me the cold shoulder.

I turned to spring.

Spring said: "Not bad." Then it started raining.

I ran to summer.

Summer laughed really hard. I got heatstroke.

Finally I went to autumn.

Autumn looked at me, quietly let one leaf drift down, and landed it on my head.

That's when I understood: the joke wasn't bad — autumn was just the only one willing to play along.
en.editorNote: Send to the friend who always sits through your bad jokes anyway
variations: Add: "Winter texted later: 'I heard the joke. I just process things slowly.'"
Couple version: "I told my partner a joke. They gave me a cold stare. I said: 'Are you winter?' They said: 'I'm Read at 11:47 PM.'"

items.sourceNote: 受『去買早餐被拍肩說我先到欸—我流川楓』台式諧音梗啟發，改寫為地鐵讓座的籃球諧音版

zh-tw.content:
我在捷運上滑手機，旁邊一個阿姨拍我肩膀說：「年輕人，這是博愛座。」

我抬頭一看，她身後還站著三個人。

我：「您要坐嗎？」

阿姨：「我不坐，但這位大哥要坐。」

我：「那他怎麼不直接說？」

阿姨：「他害羞。」

我：「那您怎麼不害羞？」

阿姨：「我退休了。」
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合通勤時間傳給朋友，配一張捷運博愛座照片更傳神
variations: 可以再接：「我站起來後，那位大哥默默走到下一節車廂。」
改成公車版：「司機廣播：『請發揮愛心讓座。』全車所有人同時假裝睡著。」

en.content:
I'm scrolling on the subway when an older lady taps my shoulder: "Young man, this is a priority seat."

I look up. There are three other people standing behind her.

Me: "Would you like to sit?"

Lady: "I don't want it, but this gentleman does."

Me: "Why didn't he ask?"

Lady: "He's shy."

Me: "Why aren't you shy?"

Lady: "I'm retired."
en.editorNote: Send during your commute — bonus points if you actually take a photo of a priority seat
variations: Add: "After I stood up, the gentleman silently walked to the next car."
Bus version: "Driver announces: 'Please offer your seat to those in need.' Every passenger simultaneously pretends to sleep."

items.sourceNote: 受『strong password, stronger humor』密碼題材一句梗啟發，改寫為密碼跟使用者互相崩潰的擬人短劇

zh-tw.content:
公司系統要我換密碼。

我輸入舊密碼，系統說：「不能跟前十二個一樣。」

我輸入新密碼，系統說：「不能跟你姓名、生日、寵物有關。」

我輸入一串亂碼，系統說：「太弱。」

我輸入更亂的，系統說：「太像鍵盤亂打。」

我崩潰大喊：「那你要什麼？」

系統默默回：「我也不知道，我只是被設定成這樣。」

我們對視三秒，然後一起被鎖定。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合改密碼改到崩潰時，傳給IT部門的朋友求救
variations: 可以再接：「IT回信：『請洽系統。』我：『系統剛跟我一起被鎖定。』」
改成銀行APP版：「我輸入密碼三次，APP溫柔地說：『要不要先深呼吸？』」

en.content:
Company system tells me to update my password.

I type the old one. System: "Can't match your last twelve passwords."

I type a new one. System: "Can't include your name, birthday, or pet's name."

I type random characters. System: "Too weak."

I type more random ones. System: "Looks like keyboard mashing."

I snap: "What do you WANT?"

System quietly: "Honestly, I don't know. I was just configured this way."

We stare at each other for three seconds, then get locked out together.
en.editorNote: Send to your IT-friend after the fifth password reset attempt
variations: Add: "IT replies: 'Please contact the system.' Me: 'The system just got locked out with me.'"
Banking app version: "I enter my password three times. The app gently asks: 'Would you like to take a deep breath first?'"

items.sourceNote: 受英文「I told winter a joke — it gave me the cold shoulder」一句梗啟發，改寫為超商店員與冷氣的擬人對話

zh-tw.content:
我走進超商，店員說：「歡迎光臨。」

冷氣突然停了。

店員：「不好意思，它今天心情不好。」

我：「冷氣也會有心情？」

店員：「對，它從早上就一直被客人嫌太冷。」

我抬頭看了一眼冷氣。

它「嗯」了一聲，又開始吹了。

但只吹店員那一邊。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合天氣超熱進超商被冷氣救活時，傳給朋友
variations: 可以再接：「我結帳時冷氣對我說：『下次來請帶讚美。』」
改成辦公室版：「公司冷氣聽到我說太冷，立刻關機三小時表達抗議。」

en.content:
I walk into a convenience store. Clerk says: "Welcome."

The AC suddenly cuts out.

Clerk: "Sorry, it's in a mood today."

Me: "The AC has moods?"

Clerk: "Yeah. Customers have been calling it too cold since this morning."

I look up at the AC.

It sighs, then starts blowing again.

But only on the clerk's side.
en.editorNote: Send to a friend when you've just escaped a heatwave into a cold store
variations: Add: "At checkout the AC told me: 'Next time, bring compliments.'"
Office version: "Office AC heard me say it was too cold, then shut down for three hours in protest."

items.sourceNote: 受台式諧音梗『星巴克=八克』啟發，改寫為手搖飲店員與顧客的諧音誤會

zh-tw.content:
我去手搖飲店點單。

我：「我要一杯小杯的。」

店員：「小咖一杯！」（很大聲）

後面排隊的人都看我。

我：「不是，是小杯，不是小咖。」

店員：「啊抱歉，那大咖一杯！」

我：「我剛剛說小杯。」

店員：「喔——小咖大杯！」

我：「⋯⋯算了，我自己倒。」
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合在排隊買飲料時，傳給朋友當開場白
variations: 可以再接：「店員最後寫紙條給我：『下次直接指。』」
改成咖啡店版：「我說中杯熱拿鐵，店員寫成：『中年熱戀』。」

en.content:
I'm ordering at a bubble tea shop.

Me: "I'd like a small one."

Clerk shouts: "ONE SMALL FRY!"

Everyone in line turns around.

Me: "No, small drink, not small fry."

Clerk: "Oh sorry — ONE BIG FRY!"

Me: "I said small drink."

Clerk: "Got it — SMALL FRY, BIG CUP!"

Me: "...Never mind. I'll pour it myself."
en.editorNote: Send to a friend while waiting in a drink line — instant mood-setter
variations: Add: "The clerk finally handed me a note: 'Next time, just point.'"
Coffee shop version: "I said medium hot latte. The cup came back labeled: 'Mid-life hot romance.'"

items.sourceNote: 受『Why did the mountain join the party? It wanted to reach its peak performance』英文一句梗啟發，改寫為山與山友的擬人短劇

zh-tw.content:
我去爬山，半路坐下休息。

旁邊的山友問：「累了？」

我：「嗯。」

山友：「山頂風景超美，再撐一下。」

這時山自己開口：「其實也還好。」

我跟山友同時看向山。

山：「就一塊石頭，跟下面這塊一樣。只是它高。」

山友默默站起來：「我下山了。」

我：「那我也下了。」

山：「⋯⋯欸，我開玩笑的。」
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合爬山爬到一半想下山時，傳到登山群組
variations: 可以再接：「下山路上，山一路喊：『回來啦，我請你看雲海！』」
改成跑步版：「我跑到一半，操場跟我說：『要不要先休息？反正你也跑不完。』」

en.content:
I'm hiking and sit down to rest.

Fellow hiker: "Tired?"

Me: "Yeah."

Hiker: "The summit view is amazing. Push a little more."

Then the mountain itself speaks: "Honestly, it's just okay."

The hiker and I both look up.

Mountain: "It's the same rock as the one below. Just taller."

The hiker stands up: "I'm going back down."

Me: "Same."

Mountain: "...Wait, I was kidding."
en.editorNote: Send to your hiking group chat the moment you regret the trail
variations: Add: "All the way down, the mountain kept yelling: 'Come back! I'll throw in a sea of clouds!'"
Running version: "Halfway through a run, the track told me: 'Wanna take a break? You're not finishing anyway.'"

items.sourceNote: 受英文『That joke was snow bad it's good』雪相關諧音梗啟發，改寫為手機自動修正搞砸對話的擬人小劇

zh-tw.content:
我傳訊息給主管：「我等等到。」

手機自動修正成：「我等等倒。」

主管已讀。

我趕快補：「打錯，是到。」

手機修正成：「打錯，是倒。」

我深呼吸，慢慢打：「我馬上來。」

手機：「我媽上來。」

主管回：「⋯⋯需要先請假嗎？」

我把手機翻過來，背面對著我。

它震動了一下，像在偷笑。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合自動修正連環翻車時，截圖傳到朋友群求救
variations: 可以再接：「我最後直接打電話，手機把通話錄音命名為『我媽上來』。」
改成家人版：「我傳『晚餐我吃飽了』，被改成『晚餐我吃爆了』，媽馬上多煮一鍋。」

en.content:
I text my boss: "On my way."

Autocorrect changes it to: "On my hay."

Boss reads it.

I panic-type: "Typo — meant way."

Autocorrect: "Typo — meant hay."

I take a breath and try: "Coming right now."

Autocorrect: "Coming right cow."

Boss replies: "...Do you need the day off?"

I flip my phone face-down.

It vibrates once, like it's laughing.
en.editorNote: Send to the group chat the next time autocorrect ruins your life
variations: Add: "I finally just called. My phone saved the recording as 'right cow.wav'."
Family version: "I texted Mom 'I'm full from dinner.' It became 'I'm fuel from dinner.' She made me a second meal."

items.sourceNote: 受『Ice see what you did there』英文諧音一句梗啟發，改寫為冰箱跟主人三更半夜對話的擬人短劇

zh-tw.content:
凌晨兩點，我打開冰箱。

冰箱亮起來，看著我：「又是你？」

我：「我只是看看。」

冰箱：「你昨天也是這樣說。」

我：「我真的只是看看。」

冰箱：「你前天也是。」

我默默拿出布丁。

冰箱：「我就知道。」

我：「不要跟我媽說。」

冰箱：「她剛剛站你後面三秒了。」

我回頭，媽手裡拿著湯匙：「兩個。」
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合半夜偷吃宵夜被抓包時，傳給也常半夜開冰箱的朋友
variations: 可以再接：「媽吃完說：『下次記得拿兩個。』冰箱默默亮了一下。」
改成減肥版：「冰箱看我一眼說：『你不是說要瘦？』我說：『瘦的是明天的我。』」

en.content:
2 a.m. I open the fridge.

Fridge lights up and stares: "You again?"

Me: "Just looking."

Fridge: "You said that yesterday."

Me: "Really, just looking."

Fridge: "And the day before."

I quietly pull out a pudding.

Fridge: "Knew it."

Me: "Don't tell my mom."

Fridge: "She's been standing behind you for three seconds."

I turn around. Mom is holding a spoon: "Make it two."
en.editorNote: Send to your fellow midnight-snack offender the next time you get caught
variations: Add: "Mom finishes hers: 'Grab two next time.' The fridge dims its light approvingly."
Diet version: "Fridge looks at me: 'Weren't you cutting?' Me: 'That was tomorrow-me's job.'"

items.sourceNote: 受『Why was the computer cold? It left its Windows open』英文一句梗啟發，擴寫為辦公室電腦擬人短劇

zh-tw.content:
同事問我：「你的電腦怎麼一直在發抖？」

我看了一眼螢幕：「它說它冷。」

同事：「為什麼？」

我：「它的視窗開太多沒關。」

電腦藍屏一下，像在嘆氣。

我趕快關了二十個分頁。

電腦：「謝謝，現在只剩感冒了。」
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合電腦跑很慢、或同事抱怨開太多分頁時隨手丟一個
variations: 可以再接：「我泡了杯熱可可放它旁邊，它的風扇終於不轉了。」
改成手機版：「手機說它快沒電是因為心也涼了。」

en.content:
Coworker: "Why is your computer shivering?"

I glance at the screen: "It says it's cold."

Coworker: "Why?"

Me: "It left too many Windows open."

The computer blue-screens, like a sigh.

I close twenty tabs.

Computer: "Thanks. Now I just have a cold."
en.editorNote: Drop this in the team chat when someone complains about a slow laptop
variations: Add: "I put a hot cocoa next to it. The fan finally stopped spinning."
Phone version: "My phone says it's dying because its heart got cold too."

items.sourceNote: 受辦公室『會議能用 email 解決就好』類英文一句梗啟發，改寫為會議室與時鐘擬人對話短劇

zh-tw.content:
會議進入第三個小時。

時鐘嘆氣：「我也想下班。」

投影機說：「我從第一張投影片就想了。」

白板：「你們忍一下，我已經被擦十次。」

主管：「最後一個議題，五分鐘。」

會議室的椅子集體往後退了一公分。

四十分鐘後，主管：「好，下次會議再討論。」

時鐘看著我：「跟你說過了。」
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合長會議結束、傳到同事群組討拍時使用
variations: 可以再接：「散會時投影機自己關機，像在道別。」
改成遠距會議版：「鏡頭一直關著的同事，其實是時鐘的代言人。」

en.content:
The meeting hits hour three.

The clock sighs: "I want to clock out too."

The projector: "I've wanted out since slide one."

The whiteboard: "Be strong. I've been erased ten times."

Manager: "Last item, five minutes."

Every chair in the room scoots back one centimeter.

Forty minutes later, manager: "Let's continue this next meeting."

The clock looks at me: "Told you."
en.editorNote: Send to coworkers right after a meeting that should have been an email
variations: Add: "As we leave, the projector shuts itself off, like a quiet goodbye."
Remote version: "The coworker with the camera off was secretly the clock all along."

items.sourceNote: 受台灣經典『豆腐／嫩／扶』類諧音笑話風格啟發，改寫為珍珠奶茶店店員諧音對話

zh-tw.content:
我去飲料店點珍奶。

店員：「請問甜度冰塊？」

我：「半糖少冰。」

店員：「珍珠要 Q 一點還是軟一點？」

我：「我要『難過』一點的。」

店員愣住：「？」

我：「因為今天加班，跟我一樣。」

店員默默在杯子上寫了一個哭臉。

隔壁同事接過自己的：「我這杯笑臉的，是不是代表我準時下班？」
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合加班買飲料、傳到同事群討溫暖時使用
variations: 可以再接：「我喝一口，珍珠真的特別有彈性，像在拍我肩膀。」
改成咖啡版：「我點美式：『跟我人生一樣，越苦越清醒。』店員寫：『加油。』」

en.content:
I order bubble tea.

Barista: "Sweetness and ice level?"

Me: "Half sweet, less ice."

Barista: "Pearls chewy or soft?"

Me: "I'll have them... sad."

Barista pauses: "...?"

Me: "Because I'm working late, just like them."

They quietly draw a crying face on the cup.

My coworker grabs hers — a smiley face: "Does this mean I'm leaving on time?"
en.editorNote: Use this when you're grabbing late-night drinks with the overtime crew
variations: Add: "First sip — the pearls were extra bouncy, like a pat on the back."
Coffee version: "I order an Americano: 'Bitter like my life.' Barista writes: 'You got this.'"

items.sourceNote: 受台灣常見『工程師加班／頭髮』類後勁冷笑話啟發，改寫為頭髮擬人短劇

zh-tw.content:
我照鏡子，發現頭髮少了一撮。

我問鏡子：「我的頭髮去哪了？」

鏡子：「它說它先走了。」

我：「去哪？」

鏡子：「下一份工作。」

我：「為什麼？」

鏡子：「它說你這邊壓力太大。」

我嘆氣，剩下的頭髮也往後退了一步。

鏡子：「它們在開會。」
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合熬夜趕案子、傳到工程師群組互相取暖時使用
variations: 可以再接：「隔天早上，所有頭髮集體交了離職信，理由欄寫：『公司方向不明。』」
改成上班族版：「我頭髮離職的那天，老闆說：『你最近怎麼看起來特別通透？』」

en.content:
I look in the mirror. A patch of hair is missing.

Me: "Where did my hair go?"

Mirror: "It said it left."

Me: "To where?"

Mirror: "A new job."

Me: "Why?"

Mirror: "It said the working conditions up here were rough."

I sigh. The rest of my hair takes a step back.

Mirror: "They're having a meeting."
en.editorNote: Share with the engineering group chat during crunch week
variations: Add: "The next morning, every strand handed in two weeks' notice. Reason: 'unclear company direction.'"
Office version: "The day my hair quit, my boss said: 'You look so... clear-headed lately.'"

items.sourceNote: 受台灣常見『鬧鐘／棉被』類擬人冷笑話啟發，改寫為棉被與鬧鐘聯手反抗的早晨短劇

zh-tw.content:
鬧鐘響了。

我伸手按掉。

棉被輕輕把我捲回去：「再五分鐘。」

我：「我要遲到了。」

棉被：「我會幫你請假。」

我：「你又不會打字。」

棉被：「我會用『翻身』摩斯密碼。」

鬧鐘在旁邊：「他剛剛跟我合作過，不要信。」

我看了一眼時間，還有十分鐘。

棉被：「夠了，剩下九分鐘半。」

我又躺回去。

下一秒，是中午。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合貪睡爬不起來、傳到朋友群組求救時使用
variations: 可以再接：「醒來時鬧鐘已經換班，太陽親自進來叫我。」
改成週末版：「週六的鬧鐘只是來打招呼，按掉它還會說『不好意思打擾』。」

en.content:
The alarm goes off.

I slap it.

The blanket gently rolls me back: "Five more minutes."

Me: "I'll be late."

Blanket: "I'll call in for you."

Me: "You can't type."

Blanket: "I'll send Morse code with rolls."

Alarm, from the side: "He and I have collaborated before. Don't trust him."

I check the time — ten minutes left.

Blanket: "Plenty. Nine and a half now."

I lie back down.

The next second, it's noon.
en.editorNote: Send to the friend who also lost their morning to the snooze button
variations: Add: "When I finally woke, the alarm had clocked out. The sun was doing its shift."
Weekend version: "Saturday alarms just stop by to say hi — they apologize for the intrusion when you hit snooze."

items.sourceNote: 受台灣『慢跑／jogging』諧音冷笑話風格啟發，改寫為健身房短劇

zh-tw.content:
我第一次去健身房。

教練：「先暖身，跑步機慢跑十分鐘。」

我上去，跑了三分鐘，腿就軟了。

教練：「怎麼了？」

我：「我這不是慢跑，是『慘』跑。」

教練：「再撐一下。」

我：「我撐的不是體力，是面子。」

旁邊的阿伯把速度調到八點五，回頭看我一眼，沒說話。

那一眼，比深蹲還重。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合運動後傳到朋友群組討拍時使用
variations: 可以再接：「下機時，跑步機自己關掉，像在說『辛苦你了』。」
改成飛輪版：「飛輪老師說：『出發囉！』我心裡回：『我已經想回家了。』」

en.content:
First time at the gym.

Trainer: "Warm up. Ten minutes light jog on the treadmill."

I step on. Three minutes in, my legs are jelly.

Trainer: "You good?"

Me: "This isn't a jog. This is a slog."

Trainer: "Push through."

Me: "I'm not pushing through stamina. I'm pushing through embarrassment."

The guy next to me cranks his speed to 8.5, glances over, says nothing.

That glance hit harder than any squat.
en.editorNote: Send to the group chat after a brutal first gym session
variations: Add: "When I step off, the treadmill shuts itself down — like it's saying 'you did your best.'"
Spin class version: "Instructor yells 'Let's go!' My brain replies 'Let's go home.'"

items.sourceNote: 受英文 cold pun『computer caught a cold / left a window open』啟發，改寫為電腦擬人短劇

zh-tw.content:
我的筆電早上開機，螢幕一直閃。

我問它：「你還好嗎？」

筆電：「我感冒了。」

我：「電腦怎麼會感冒？」

筆電：「你昨天視窗開太多。」

我：「那關掉就好。」

筆電：「來不及了，我已經把病毒傳給滑鼠。」

滑鼠在旁邊咳了一聲。

鍵盤默默戴上一個 N95 鍵帽。

我關機，重開。

螢幕跳出一行字：「我請假一天。」
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合電腦當機、傳到工程師或上班族群組討笑時使用
variations: 可以再接：「下午我打開瀏覽器，每個分頁都跟我說『多喝水』。」
改成手機版：「我手機沒電：『我不是沒電，我是低燒。』」

en.content:
My laptop boots up. The screen keeps flickering.

Me: "You okay?"

Laptop: "I caught a cold."

Me: "How does a computer catch a cold?"

Laptop: "You left too many windows open yesterday."

Me: "I'll just close them."

Laptop: "Too late. I already passed it to the mouse."

The mouse coughs.

The keyboard quietly puts on an N95 keycap.

I shut down. Restart.

A line pops up on screen: "Taking a sick day."
en.editorNote: Drop this in the dev chat next time someone's laptop acts up
variations: Add: "That afternoon I opened the browser. Every tab told me to stay hydrated."
Phone version: "My phone's battery is low: 'I'm not dying. I just have a mild fever.'"

items.sourceNote: 受台灣常見『冰箱／剩菜』類擬人冷笑話啟發，改寫為冰箱開家庭會議短劇

zh-tw.content:
我半夜餓了，打開冰箱。

燈一亮，裡面的食物全部正在開會。

隔夜飯：「我提議，今晚誰被吃，誰光榮退伍。」

滷蛋舉手：「我已經待了兩週，我自願。」

青菜小聲說：「我已經發黃了，可能不算退伍，算殉職。」

優格冷冷地說：「我過期三天了，我們等等就要開追思會。」

我看了一圈，默默把門關上。

外送 App 跳出通知：「您在凌晨一點下單，常見品項：宵夜。」

它比我懂我。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合半夜叫外送、傳到吃貨群組分享時使用
variations: 可以再接：「外送員到的時候，冰箱燈又亮了一下，像在跟我說『下次別忘了我』。」
改成宿舍版：「室友的泡麵問：『要不要我們三個一起，分一包？』我說：『要。』」

en.content:
Midnight hunger. I open the fridge.

The light flicks on — every item is mid-meeting.

Leftover rice: "Motion: whoever gets eaten tonight retires with honors."

Braised egg raises a hand: "I've been in here two weeks. I volunteer."

The vegetables whisper: "I've already gone yellow. This isn't retirement — it's a funeral."

The yogurt, cold as ever: "I expired three days ago. Save me a seat at the memorial."

I look around. Quietly close the door.

Delivery app pings: "You're ordering at 1 AM. Popular pick: late-night snacks."

It knows me better than I do.
en.editorNote: Perfect for the late-night snack group chat after you cave and order in
variations: Add: "When the driver arrives, the fridge light flickers — like it's saying 'don't forget me next time.'"
Dorm version: "My roommate's instant noodles ask: 'Want to split one between three?' I say: 'Yes.'"

items.sourceNote: 受台灣經典『丸子／來丸』類諧音冷笑話啟發，改寫為夜市攤販諧音短劇

zh-tw.content:
我去夜市，老闆問：「要什麼？」

我：「老闆，你這攤最招牌的是什麼？」

老闆：「貢丸湯。」

我：「為什麼這麼有名？」

老闆：「因為客人來了都『貢』獻一張嘴。」

我笑不出來。

老闆：「你笑點是不是壞了？」

我：「對，剛剛在前一攤被烤香腸『串』走了。」

老闆默默多舀了一顆丸子。

他說：「這顆，是賠你的笑點。」
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合逛夜市、傳到吃貨朋友群組分享時使用
variations: 可以再接：「我喝完湯，碗底寫著『下次還要來』，原來是老闆寫的。」
改成早餐店版：「老闆娘問：『漢堡要加蛋嗎？』我：『加心情可以嗎？』她說：『今天賣完了。』」

en.content:
Night market. The boss asks: "What'll it be?"

Me: "What's your signature dish?"

Boss: "Meatball soup."

Me: "Why's it famous?"

Boss: "Because every customer leaves their sense of humor in the bowl."

I don't laugh.

Boss: "Is your funny bone broken?"

Me: "Yeah, the sausage stand two stalls back stole it."

The boss quietly scoops in an extra meatball.

He says: "This one's a refund for your laugh."
en.editorNote: Send to the foodie chat after a night market run
variations: Add: "I finish the soup. The bottom of the bowl says 'come back soon' — turns out the boss wrote it."
Breakfast shop version: "Auntie asks: 'Egg in your burger?' Me: 'Can you add good vibes?' She says: 'Sold out today.'"

items.sourceNote: 受英文 dad joke『I built a snowman and now I have cold feet』啟發，改寫為雪人擬人短劇

zh-tw.content:
我堆了一個雪人。

剛堆好，他就開口：「我可以走了嗎？」

我：「你才剛站起來。」

雪人：「我已經想退休了。」

我：「為什麼？」

雪人：「因為我天生就很冷淡。」

旁邊的胡蘿蔔鼻子掉下來。

雪人：「你看，連我的鼻子都不想跟我合作。」

太陽從雲後探出頭。

雪人：「來了，我的離職主管。」
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合下雪天、傳到朋友群組搞笑時使用
variations: 可以再接：「下午我回來，雪人留下一灘水跟一張紙條：『辭呈，請查收。』」
改成沙灘版：「我堆了沙堡，海浪走過來說：『不好意思，我來收件。』」

en.content:
I built a snowman.

The second he stood up, he asked: "Can I leave now?"

Me: "You literally just got here."

Snowman: "I'm ready to retire."

Me: "Why?"

Snowman: "I was born cold and distant."

The carrot nose falls off.

Snowman: "See? Even my nose won't commit."

The sun peeks out from behind a cloud.

Snowman: "There he is. My exit interviewer."
en.editorNote: Drop in the group chat on the first snow day
variations: Add: "I came back in the afternoon. He left a puddle and a note: 'Resignation attached.'"
Beach version: "I built a sandcastle. A wave walks up: 'Sorry, here for pickup.'"

items.sourceNote: 受 Dcard 上班族『電梯／樓層』類冷笑話啟發，改寫為電梯擬人短劇

zh-tw.content:
週一早上，我進電梯。

電梯：「早安，要去幾樓？」

我：「八樓。」

電梯：「你確定？」

我：「確定。」

電梯：「我建議你按 B2，那邊還有停車位，可以開車去玩。」

我：「我要上班。」

電梯沉默了三秒。

電梯：「我尊重你，但我不認同。」

門打開，是八樓。

電梯小聲說：「祝你撐到下班。」
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合週一早上提不起勁、傳到同事群組苦笑時使用
variations: 可以再接：「下班時我又進去，電梯說：『歡迎回來，我等你一整天。』」
改成宿舍版：「電梯到我那層，門開了一半又關上：『不好意思，我以為你還在睡。』」

en.content:
Monday morning. I step into the elevator.

Elevator: "Good morning. Which floor?"

Me: "Eight."

Elevator: "You sure?"

Me: "Yes."

Elevator: "I'd recommend B2. Parking's still open down there. You could drive somewhere fun."

Me: "I'm going to work."

Three seconds of silence.

Elevator: "I respect that. I don't agree with it."

The doors open. Floor eight.

Elevator, softly: "Hope you make it to five."
en.editorNote: Use this on Monday morning when the office group chat needs a laugh
variations: Add: "After work I step back in. The elevator says: 'Welcome back. I waited all day.'"
Dorm version: "Elevator stops on my floor. Doors open halfway, then close: 'Sorry, thought you were still asleep.'"

items.sourceNote: 受台灣『WiFi／訊號／已讀』類後勁冷笑話啟發，改寫為 WiFi 訊號擬人短劇

zh-tw.content:
我在家裡看影片，畫面突然卡住。

我：「WiFi，你還好嗎？」

WiFi：「我累了。」

我：「為什麼？」

WiFi：「你剛剛同時開了三十七個分頁。」

我：「我只是在『多工』。」

WiFi：「你只是在逃避其中一件。」

我安靜下來。

WiFi：「我幫你關掉購物車那幾個。」

我：「不用，那是我今天的快樂來源。」

WiFi 嘆氣，訊號從滿格掉到一格。

它說：「那我只能盡力。」
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合 WiFi 卡住、傳到朋友群組討拍時使用
variations: 可以再接：「我重開路由器，它跳出一行字：『我請了三秒病假，謝謝體諒。』」
改成手機版：「手機說：『我電量 1%，你還想拍十張自拍。我們是不是該談談？』」

en.content:
Watching a video at home. The screen freezes.

Me: "WiFi, you okay?"

WiFi: "I'm tired."

Me: "Why?"

WiFi: "You opened thirty-seven tabs at once."

Me: "I'm multitasking."

WiFi: "You're avoiding one of those tasks."

I go quiet.

WiFi: "I'll close the shopping cart tabs for you."

Me: "Don't. Those are my joy for today."

WiFi sighs. Signal drops from full bars to one.

It says: "Then I'll do my best."
en.editorNote: Send when your WiFi gives up mid-binge
variations: Add: "I restart the router. A line pops up: 'Took a three-second sick day. Thanks for understanding.'"
Phone version: "Phone says: 'I'm at 1%. You want ten more selfies. Should we talk?'"

items.sourceNote: 受 2026 流行語『歸剛欸』『咩噗』等諧音梗啟發，改寫為日常對話短劇

zh-tw.content:
朋友問我：「你最近怎麼了？」

我：「我『歸剛欸』。」

朋友：「什麼意思？」

我：「就是一直在做沒意義的事。」

朋友：「比如？」

我：「比如打開冰箱，看一看，再關起來。」

朋友：「然後呢？」

我：「五分鐘後再開一次，看看有沒有更新。」

朋友：「冰箱又不是 App。」

我：「但我心裡有期待。」

朋友默默拿出他的手機，按了一下螢幕。

他：「我也歸剛欸，我剛剛在等通知。」
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合週末廢在家、傳到朋友群組共鳴時使用
variations: 可以再接：「後來冰箱真的更新了，多了一張我媽留的紙條：『不要一直開。』」
改成上班族版：「我『歸剛欸』地重整收件匣三次，第四次才發現自己根本沒登入。」

en.content:
Friend asks: "What's up with you lately?"

Me: "I'm in pointless mode."

Friend: "Meaning?"

Me: "I keep doing things with no purpose."

Friend: "Like what?"

Me: "Like opening the fridge, looking inside, closing it."

Friend: "And then?"

Me: "Opening it again in five minutes, checking for updates."

Friend: "The fridge isn't an app."

Me: "But I have hope."

Friend quietly pulls out his phone. Taps the screen.

Him: "Same. I'm refreshing for a notification."
en.editorNote: Send on a lazy weekend when the friend chat needs to feel seen
variations: Add: "Later the fridge really did get an update — a note from my mom: 'Stop opening it.'"
Office version: "I refreshed my inbox three times in pointless mode. On the fourth, I realized I wasn't even logged in."

items.sourceNote: 受 2026 流行語『甘阿捏』『郭P4』啟發，改寫為辦公室對話短劇

zh-tw.content:
主管走到我桌前。

主管：「這份報告，可以星期五前交嗎？」

我：「甘阿捏？」

主管：「對，就阿捏。」

我：「但我這週還有三個會議。」

主管：「那你週末加一下班。」

我：「郭P4。」

主管：「什麼？」

我：「沒事，我是說『好的P4』，第四個 priority。」

主管點點頭走了。

旁邊同事小聲說：「你剛剛差點被開除。」

我：「我知道，所以我把『關我屁事』翻譯成英文縮寫。」
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合上班族抱怨工作量、傳到部門群組苦中作樂時使用
variations: 可以再接：「主管走回來：『P4 是什麼？』我：『就是 Pretty Fast For sure，保證很快。』」
改成學生版：「教授問：『這份作業可以下週交嗎？』我：『甘阿捏？』教授：『不然咧。』」

en.content:
Boss walks up to my desk.

Boss: "Can you turn in this report by Friday?"

Me: "Really? Like, really really?"

Boss: "Yes. Really really."

Me: "But I have three meetings this week."

Boss: "Then put in some weekend hours."

Me: "NMP."

Boss: "What?"

Me: "Nothing. I said 'No More Problems.' Got it."

Boss nods and walks away.

Coworker whispers: "You almost got fired."

Me: "I know. That's why I translated 'Not My Problem' into a TLA."
en.editorNote: Send when the team chat needs a survival laugh about overload
variations: Add: "Boss comes back: 'What's NMP again?' Me: 'Notably Motivated Person. That's me.'"
Student version: "Professor: 'Can you submit this by next week?' Me: 'Really really?' Professor: 'Or else.'"

items.sourceNote: 受 2026 國外辦公室冷笑話合集啟發，改寫為遠距會議擬人短劇

zh-tw.content:
週三下午，我打開視訊軟體。

軟體：「歡迎回來，這是你今天第七場會議。」

我：「我知道。」

軟體：「你要開鏡頭嗎？」

我：「不要。」

軟體：「你要開麥克風嗎？」

我：「也不要。」

軟體：「那你為什麼要進來？」

我：「為了證明我有參加。」

軟體沉默了兩秒。

軟體：「我懂了，你需要的不是會議，是出席紀錄。」

我：「對。」

軟體：「那我幫你掛著，你去泡咖啡。」

我：「你是我見過最懂我的同事。」
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合連續開會崩潰、傳到同事群組互相理解時使用
variations: 可以再接：「會議結束時，軟體跳出一行：『今天表現：人在心不在，達標。』」
改成在校學生版：「直播課軟體：『你已經連續三堂都靜音黑畫面，建議你升級為旁聽生。』」

en.content:
Wednesday afternoon. I open the video conferencing app.

App: "Welcome back. This is your seventh meeting today."

Me: "I know."

App: "Camera on?"

Me: "No."

App: "Mic on?"

Me: "Also no."

App: "Then why are you joining?"

Me: "To prove I was here."

Two seconds of silence.

App: "Got it. You don't need a meeting. You need an attendance record."

Me: "Correct."

App: "I'll keep you connected. Go make coffee."

Me: "You're the most understanding coworker I've ever had."
en.editorNote: Send to the team chat after a back-to-back meeting day
variations: Add: "At the end, the app pops up a note: 'Today's score: physically present, mentally elsewhere. Goal met.'"
Student version: "Online class app: 'You've been muted with camera off for three classes straight. Consider downgrading to audit.'"

items.sourceNote: 受台灣經典『jogging 弄破襪』類英中混搭諧音梗啟發，改寫為健身房對話短劇

zh-tw.content:
我第一次去健身房，教練問我目標。

我：「我想練『core』。」

教練：「核心肌群？」

我：「不是，我想練『靠』。」

教練：「什麼意思？」

我：「就是做每個動作的時候都能很自然地說出『靠』。」

教練停了一下。

教練：「那你已經練成了。」

我：「真的？」

教練：「你剛剛拿水壺都喊了一聲。」

我：「因為它五百毫升，重得跟啞鈴一樣。」

教練：「那是空的。」
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合第一次去健身房後傳到朋友群組自嘲時使用
variations: 可以再接：「教練說：『下次我們練「shoulder」。』我：『修但幾勒，我先練「sit down」。』」
改成瑜伽版：「老師說：『下一個動作是 downward dog。』我：『下完就上不來了 dog。』」

en.content:
First time at the gym. The trainer asks my goal.

Me: "I want to work on my core."

Trainer: "Abs and stability?"

Me: "No. My groan core."

Trainer: "Excuse me?"

Me: "I want to be able to groan naturally during every rep."

Trainer pauses.

Trainer: "You're already there."

Me: "Really?"

Trainer: "You just groaned picking up that water bottle."

Me: "It's 500 ml. That's basically a dumbbell."

Trainer: "It's empty."
en.editorNote: Send after your first gym session when the group chat needs proof you tried
variations: Add: "Trainer: 'Next time, shoulders.' Me: 'Hold up. Let me master sit-downs first.'"
Yoga version: "Instructor: 'Next pose, downward dog.' Me: 'I can go down. Coming back up is a separate dog.'"

items.sourceNote: 受 2026 國外『AI / chatbot』類辦公室冷笑話啟發，改寫為人工智慧擬人短劇

zh-tw.content:
我請 AI 幫我寫一封辭職信。

AI：「沒問題，請告訴我原因。」

我：「累。」

AI：「太短了，可以再多一點嗎？」

我：「很累。」

AI：「再具體一點？」

我：「我每天上班像在演一齣我看不懂的劇。」

AI：「很有畫面，但這樣寫主管會生氣。」

我：「那你幫我潤一下。」

AI 想了三秒。

AI：「『因個人生涯規劃，期望投入更具挑戰性的領域，特此提出離職申請。』」

我：「太假了。」

AI：「你要『真』還是『拿到推薦信』？」

我安靜了。

AI：「我懂了，我幫你選後者。」
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合工作低潮、傳到朋友群組求安慰時使用
variations: 可以再接：「AI 補一句：『要不要順便幫你寫一封給未來自己的：謝謝你沒當場掀桌。』」
改成請假版：「AI：『你想請病假還是事假？』我：『請心靈假。』AI：『公司沒這項，我幫你寫成腸胃炎。』」

en.content:
I asked an AI to write my resignation letter.

AI: "Sure. Tell me why."

Me: "Tired."

AI: "Too short. A little more?"

Me: "Very tired."

AI: "More specific?"

Me: "Every workday feels like acting in a play I don't understand."

AI: "Vivid. Your boss will be furious."

Me: "Then polish it."

AI thinks for three seconds.

AI: "'Due to personal career planning, I am pursuing opportunities better aligned with my long-term goals. Please accept my resignation.'"

Me: "Too fake."

AI: "Do you want 'honest' or 'a reference letter'?"

I go quiet.

AI: "Understood. Going with the second one."
en.editorNote: Send during a rough work stretch when the group chat needs to laugh with you
variations: Add: "AI adds: 'Want me to also draft one to your future self: thanks for not flipping the table?'"
Sick leave version: "AI: 'Sick leave or personal day?' Me: 'Soul leave.' AI: 'Company doesn't offer that. I'll list it as a stomach bug.'"

items.sourceNote: 受國外 coffee pun『got mugged / brewing with potential』啟發，改寫為週一通勤對話

zh-tw.content:
週一早上，我問同事：「你今天怎麼眼神死？」

他舉起手上的咖啡：「剛剛在便利商店，它被搶了。」

我：「咖啡被搶？」

他：「對，被我『一口悶』。」

我：「那你現在是？」

他：「目擊證人，也是嫌犯。」
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合週一在辦公室 LINE 群組丟出來
variations: 可以加一句：「我說：『那要報案嗎？』他：『不用，下一杯我會自首。』」
改成手搖飲版：「他：『我的珍奶剛剛被吸走了。』我：『誰吸的？』他：『我，連珍珠都不放過。』」

en.content:
Monday morning. I asked my coworker: "Why do you look so dead?"

He lifted his coffee: "This got mugged at 7-Eleven."

Me: "Your coffee got mugged?"

Him: "Yeah. By my mouth."

Me: "So you're…?"

Him: "Witness. Also the suspect."
en.editorNote: Drop this in the office chat on a Monday
variations: Add: "Me: 'Filing a report?' Him: 'Nope. I'll turn myself in after the next cup.'"
Boba version: "Him: 'My bubble tea just got sucked dry.' Me: 'By who?' Him: 'Me. Didn't spare a single pearl.'"

items.sourceNote: 受 2026 corny dad joke『scarecrow outstanding in his field』啟發，改寫為農夫面試短劇

zh-tw.content:
稻草人去面試新工作。

面試官：「上一份工作為什麼離開？」

稻草人：「我太突出了。」

面試官：「同事排擠你？」

稻草人：「不是，是我『站在田裡』太突出。」

面試官：「……所以你是想轉職？」

稻草人：「對，我想找個能坐著的工作。」

面試官：「那你會什麼？」

稻草人：「嚇鳥。」

面試官：「我們是會計事務所。」

稻草人：「鳥不來就好了吧？」
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合轉職焦慮時自嘲使用
variations: 可以接：「面試官最後說：『你被錄取了，因為你比上一個應徵者「不會跑」。』」
改成業務版：「面試官：『你的優勢是？』稻草人：『我風吹日曬都不會請假。』」

en.content:
A scarecrow walks into a job interview.

Interviewer: "Why did you leave your last job?"

Scarecrow: "I was too outstanding."

Interviewer: "Coworkers excluded you?"

Scarecrow: "No. Outstanding. In my field. Literally."

Interviewer: "…So you want a career change?"

Scarecrow: "Yes. Something where I can sit."

Interviewer: "What are your skills?"

Scarecrow: "Scaring birds."

Interviewer: "This is an accounting firm."

Scarecrow: "No birds, no problem, right?"
en.editorNote: For when you're job-hunting and need to laugh at yourself
variations: Add: "Interviewer at the end: 'You're hired. Mostly because you can't run away like the last candidate did.'"
Sales version: "Interviewer: 'Your strengths?' Scarecrow: 'I never call in sick for sun, wind, or rain.'"

items.sourceNote: 受『dino-snore / sleeping bulldozer』類睡眠冷笑話啟發，改寫為深夜哄睡對話

zh-tw.content:
姪子睡不著，叫我講個故事。

我：「從前有一隻恐龍很愛睡覺。」

姪子：「然後呢？」

我：「然後他睡著了。」

姪子：「……就這樣？」

我：「對，他叫做『睡龍』。」

姪子：「很爛欸。」

我：「不爛，他打呼聲叫做『dino-snore』。」

姪子翻過去：「我要找媽媽。」

我：「為什麼？」

姪子：「她講的故事至少有結局。」
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合當叔叔阿姨被指派哄睡時用
variations: 可以再接：「我說：『那我再講一個。』姪子：『不要，我已經想睡了，是被你逼的。』」
改成貓咪版：「我：『有一隻貓很愛睡覺。』姪子：『然後？』我：『他現在還在睡。』」

en.content:
My nephew couldn't sleep and asked for a story.

Me: "Once upon a time, there was a dinosaur who loved to sleep."

Nephew: "Then what?"

Me: "Then he fell asleep."

Nephew: "…That's it?"

Me: "Yep. His name was Dino-snore."

Nephew: "That's terrible."

Me: "It's not. His snore was Jurassic-grade."

Nephew rolls over: "I want Mom."

Me: "Why?"

Nephew: "Her stories at least have endings."
en.editorNote: For uncles and aunts on bedtime duty
variations: Add: "Me: 'Want another one?' Nephew: 'No, I'm sleepy now. You forced me into it.'"
Cat version: "Me: 'There was a cat who loved to sleep.' Nephew: 'And?' Me: 'He's still sleeping.'"

items.sourceNote: 受台灣諧音梗『papaya 怕怕呀 / jogging 弄破襪』啟發，改寫為水果攤新諧音短劇

zh-tw.content:
我去水果攤，老闆問：「今天要什麼？」

我：「來顆木瓜。」

老闆：「為什麼選木瓜？」

我：「因為它最懂我，怕怕呀。」

老闆面無表情：「還要什麼？」

我：「再加一串葡萄。」

老闆：「為什麼？」

我：「因為我很『葡』服你剛剛沒笑。」

老闆把袋子遞給我：「免費送你一顆檸檬。」

我：「為什麼？」

老闆：「酸你一下。」
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合在水果攤、超市排隊無聊時講給朋友聽
variations: 可以再接：「老闆：『下次再講諧音梗，我加收諧音稅。』我：『那我給你「現金」，不要「現精」。』」
改成飲料店版：「店員：『要什麼？』我：『一杯「不加冰」，因為我已經夠冷了。』」

en.content:
I went to a fruit stand. The owner asked: "What today?"

Me: "One papaya."

Owner: "Why papaya?"

Me: "Because it gets me. It's always a-fraid-ya."

Owner, expressionless: "Anything else?"

Me: "A bunch of grapes."

Owner: "Why?"

Me: "Because I have grape respect for you not laughing."

Owner hands me the bag: "Free lemon for you."

Me: "Why?"

Owner: "So I can make your day a little sour too."
en.editorNote: Use this while waiting in line at a market with a friend
variations: Add: "Owner: 'Next pun, I add a pun tax.' Me: 'Cash only. No puns accepted.'"
Drink shop version: "Clerk: 'What can I get you?' Me: 'One no-ice. I'm already cold enough as a person.'"
